name: resend-client
description: Self-hosted multi-tenant email client built on Cloudflare Workers, D1, R2, and Workers AI.

build.command: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

bindings.name: DB
bindings.title: Email Database (D1)
bindings.description: Select an existing D1 database or create a new one. The schema is created automatically on first request.

bindings.name: R2
bindings.title: Attachment Storage (R2)
bindings.description: Select an existing R2 bucket or create a new one to store email attachments.

bindings.name: AI
bindings.title: Workers AI
bindings.description: Cloudflare Workers AI is used for draft replies, thread summaries, and auto-reply. No configuration needed — it is automatically enabled.

secrets.name: MASTER_ENCRYPTION_KEY
secrets.title: Master Encryption Key
secrets.description: 64-char hex string used to AES-256 encrypt your Resend API keys at rest. Generate with: node scripts/setup-secrets.mjs

secrets.name: JWT_SECRET
secrets.title: JWT Secret
secrets.description: Random string used to sign session tokens. Generate with: node scripts/setup-secrets.mjs

secrets.name: ADMIN_USERNAME
secrets.title: Admin Username
secrets.description: The login username for the admin panel (e.g. 'admin').

secrets.name: ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH
secrets.title: Admin Password Hash (SHA-256)
secrets.description: SHA-256 hex hash of your admin password. Generate with: node scripts/setup-secrets.mjs — then copy the ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH value.
